title: MOSPF Multicast Routing Process
description: A flowchart depicting the step-by-step process of how a Multicast OSPF (MOSPF) router builds and uses a shortest-path tree for forwarding multicast packets.
relationships: Receives IGMP report to learn group membership
Floods Group Membership LSA to update topology
Runs Dijkstra's algorithm on LSDB to compute SPT
Prunes SPT to include only branches with active members
Forwards multicast packets down the pruned tree
